definition:
παντοκράτωρ, -ορος, ὁ
 (πᾶς, κρατέω), [in LXX: frequently in Job.5:8, 17, al. (שַׁדַּי), and for צָבָא, in the phrase θεός (κυρίος) π., 2Ki.5:10, al., and frequently in Am, Za, Ma; also in Wis.7:25, Sir.42:17 50:14, 17 and frequently in Jth 2, 3Mac ;] 
almighty: 2Co.6:18, Rev.1:8 4:8 11:17 15:3 16:7, 14 9:6, 15 21:22.†
 (AS)
